entries.game.title: Echoes of the Shattered Veil

entries.act.2.name: Gilded Ossuary
entries.act.3.name: Mirror Deep
entries.act.4.name: Wound Crown

entries.ending.sever.name: Sever

entries.ui.controls: QWE/AD/ZSC move · V wait · I inventory · L codex
entries.ui.locked: The condition is not yet met
entries.balance.default.name: Default Balance
entries.biome.ashen_narthex.description: Ash settles on steps whose names were chiseled away.
entries.base.stats.warden.name: Warden Stats
entries.base.stats.ash_hound.name: Ash Hound Stats
entries.base.stats.bell_acolyte.name: Bell Acolyte Stats
entries.base.stats.ash_sentinel.name: Ash Sentinel Stats
entries.base.stats.caedmon.name: Caedmon Stats
entries.base.entity.player.warden.name: Veil Echo Warden
entries.base.entity.player.warden.description: A possible person reconstructed by the Spire from incomplete guilt.
entries.base.enemy.ash_hound.name: Ash Hound
entries.base.enemy.ash_hound.description: It tracks not blood, but the scent of Aster's old authority.
entries.base.enemy.bell_acolyte.name: Bell Acolyte
entries.base.enemy.bell_acolyte.description: It rings a treatment bell with no recall date.
entries.base.enemy.ash_sentinel.name: Ash Sentinel
entries.base.enemy.ash_sentinel.description: It still guards an order that burned centuries ago.
entries.base.boss.caedmon_rook.name: Caedmon, the Tongueless Bell
entries.base.boss.caedmon_rook.description: A gatekeeper robbed of grief, still remembering the shape of betrayal.
entries.base.item.weapon.ashglass_sabre.name: Ashglass Sabre
entries.base.item.weapon.ashglass_sabre.descript: A warning that never rang is sealed inside its edge.
entries.base.item.armor.warden_coat.name: Warden's Old Coat
entries.base.item.armor.warden_coat.description: The cuffs are worn in places your hands never made.
entries.base.item.consumable.echo_tonic.name: Echo Tonic
entries.base.item.consumable.echo_tonic.descript: Restores health and one instant of unfamiliar pain.
entries.base.item.quest.lysa_paper_bird.name: Lysa's Paper Bird
entries.base.item.quest.lysa_paper_bird.descript: One name escaped the bell between its folds.
entries.base.item.relic.oathshard.name: Oathshard
entries.base.item.relic.oathshard.description: Powerful, sharp, and still bright to Lysa's rhythm.
entries.base.affix.remembered.name: Remembered
entries.base.affix.resonant.name: Resonant
entries.base.status.memory_bleed.name: Memory Bleed
entries.base.status.slowed.name: Slowed
entries.base.status.guarded.name: Guarded
entries.npc.maelin.name: Maelin
entries.npc.maelin.description: The Bellkeeper, gently hiding too many facts.
entries.npc.ilyra.name: Ilyra
entries.npc.ilyra.description: Cartographer of roads that were never allowed to exist.
entries.npc.vey.name: Vey Ashhand
entries.npc.vey.description: A smith who refuses to be only an upgrade shop.
entries.npc.oryn.name: Sister Oryn
entries.npc.oryn.description: An archivist who leaves the old ink beneath every correction.
entries.npc.moth.name: Moth
entries.npc.moth.description: A new voice born between discarded memories.
entries.lore.bellkeepers_inventory.title: Bellkeeper's Inventory
entries.lore.bellkeepers_inventory.body: The list names forty-seven recall bells. The public stone says the Sanctum waited for only one last Warden.
entries.lore.burnt_triage_slate.title: Burnt Triage Slate
entries.lore.burnt_triage_slate.body: ‘She slept three hours, woke, and asked for the rainy night back. Treatment successful.’ A later ink crossed out every recall field.
entries.lore.recall_dates_removed.title: Recall Dates Removed
entries.lore.recall_dates_removed.body: Every signature remains. Only ‘when may I take myself back?’ has been scraped into a white groove.
entries.lore.caedmon_order.title: Order of the Seventh Gate
entries.lore.caedmon_order.body: Remove Captain Rook's private fixation on the evacuation incident. Restore obedience and fitness for duty.
entries.lore.lysa_paper_bird.title: Lysa's Paper Bird
entries.lore.lysa_paper_bird.body: Papa, the machines left before we did. You said gates let people through; they don't let orders hide behind them.
entries.lore.wall_missing_names.title: Wall of Missing Names
entries.lore.wall_missing_names.body: The names did not fall away in the Shattering. Older ash lies inside the chisel marks.
entries.lore.mercy_calibration_hymn.title: Mercy Calibration Hymn
entries.lore.mercy_calibration_hymn.body: Set pain down; do not surrender it. After the third bell, the healer must ask: do you want to return?
entries.lore.aster_gate_annotation.title: Annotation by the Gate
entries.lore.aster_gate_annotation.body: Do not open all at once. If I still insist, ask whose suffering has made me hurry. The hand matches yours around a sword.
entries.quest.a_name_returned.name: A Name Returned
entries.quest.a_name_returned.description: Recover Caedmon's grief, the order, and Lysa's name.
entries.quest.a_name_returned.unstarted: Someone in the belfry guards a forgotten promise.
entries.quest.a_name_returned.found_order: The order proves his grief was deliberately removed.
entries.quest.a_name_returned.found_bird: The paper bird preserves Lysa's name.
entries.quest.a_name_returned.suspended: You left him useful and unremembering.
entries.quest.a_name_returned.restored: You returned the memory and let him choose.
entries.dialogue.maelin.opening: The bell brought you back. Don't ask too quickly what it remembers.
entries.dialogue.maelin.choice_crack: Point to the old crack in the bell.
entries.dialogue.maelin.choice_died: ‘You said this was the first time.’
entries.dialogue.maelin.crack_reply: The crack is older than you, and more honest than my explanation.
entries.dialogue.maelin.death_reply: This is not the first time the bell knew you. Only the first time I admitted it.
entries.dialogue.caedmon.opening: Warden protocol: Aster must not pass again.
entries.dialogue.caedmon.recognition: That hand… Aster. You promised I would remember her.
entries.dialogue.caedmon.extract: Break the Echo and take its power.
entries.dialogue.caedmon.suspend: Stop attacking; leave him at the gate.
entries.dialogue.caedmon.restore: Return the pain, then step back.
entries.message.lore_found: You keep a testimony that still has a source.
entries.message.player_hit: The Echo passes through an old wound.
entries.message.enemy_defeated: The enemy's shape loosens into ash.
entries.message.trap: Teeth under the ash close around your step.
entries.message.story_room: The ash here is older than the Shattering.
entries.message.stairs: The next floor unfolds after the bell.
entries.ending.mend.description: Become a new anchor and let every memory of your name fade.
entries.ending.sever.description: Cut the Veil and return memory without a keeper.
entries.ending.crown.description: Take the Spire and become the next benevolent manager.
entries.ending.chorus.description: Build a revocable covenant for carrying memory together.
entries.vision.hands_console.name: Hands at the Brass Console
entries.vision.hands_console.frame1: Your hands pass over seven brass catches with practiced ease.
entries.vision.hands_console.frame2: Beyond the gate, Maelin says: ‘Do not open all at once.’
entries.vision.hands_console.frame3: Aster's print is cut into the final catch.
entries.vision.name_bell.name: The Name Inside the Bell
entries.vision.name_bell.frame1: Caedmon kneels beneath the treatment bell, still holding a paper bird.
entries.vision.name_bell.frame2: The bell takes grief—and the person the grief points toward.
entries.vision.name_bell.frame3: Inside the paper wing, Lysa's name has not faded.
entries.dialogue.ilyra.opening: The map has erased another road from itself.
entries.dialogue.ilyra.choice_listen: Ask her to describe the road the map refuses.
entries.dialogue.ilyra.trust: There is a kitchen window at the end. I forget who waited there, but not that I wanted to return.
entries.dialogue.vey.opening: Not all Essence can be smelted. Some of it says ‘no’ in the fire.
entries.dialogue.vey.choice_listen: Set the material down and let Vey finish.
entries.dialogue.vey.trust: First, make something useless. A purpose does not get to name it.
entries.dialogue.oryn.opening: I changed this page's title three times. The first ink is still beneath it.
entries.dialogue.oryn.choice_listen: Ask her to read the earliest version.
entries.dialogue.oryn.trust: It first said ‘seizure.’ I changed it to ‘voluntary release.’
entries.dialogue.moth.opening: …after the third name, the bell swallows the voice.
entries.dialogue.moth.choice_listen: Wait for Moth to decide whether to continue.
entries.base.vision.act1.name_inside_bell.name: The Name Inside the Bell
